Document:
# Roleplay Rule 1 - Don't use out of character knowledge Carpmosia is an MRP server that expects your character to be unaware of certain things a player may otherwise know. Make an effort to roleplay, and don’t assume things that may have more reasonable explanations.
When you hear hooves, assume horses & not zebras.
Letting relationships with other players in or out of character affect the round positively or negatively is prohibited.
Using out of character knowledge to gather items, break into places, or prepare to be an antagonist while stated as not being an antagonist is prohibited.
## New Life Rule When put into a Dead or Critical state, your character may only remember vague details about what caused their injury, but never knowledge that would reveal the name of the individual who harmed them, or the accident which caused the injury.
Using information gained through out of character channels to affect character decisions is prohibited. This includes Dead chat, as well as information gained while in a critical state.
